case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. YOLANDA PAMPOLINA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAMPOLINA, YOLANDA $4,524.06 PRINCIPAL, $997.77 INTEREST, $252.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,773.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PAMPOLINA, YOLANDA DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-20-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PAMPOLINA, YOLANDA
APPLICATION FOR INTEREST AND COST; CALCULATION OF INTEREST; CCP 1033(B)(2) NOTICE; STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT; ASSIGNMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SNYDER, DAVID B. SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCL.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $181.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $71.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PAMPOLINA, YOLANDA
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED SEP-07-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAMPOLINA, YOLANDA
